name: openskillbench-workspace
description: Benchmark, lint, and standardize reusable skills for AI coding agents.

scripts.ci: npm run build && npm run test && npm run lint:skills
scripts.lint:skills: node packages/cli/dist/index.js lint examples/code-review-skill/SKILL.md && node packages/cli/dist/index.js lint examples/frontend-skill/SKILL.md
